title: Sole came apart after 10 months
body: I've had these shoes for less than a year, about 10 months. I work in a restaurant and for the last 3 months, the glue that holds the rubber sole to the shoe has been coming undone. The shoes are now unwearable as the entire sole is almost off the shoe. For $135 I would expect a shoe to last longer than 10 months.

title: No refund after return received
body: Company has not processed refund after receiving return a month ago. I have reached out multiple times with no response. I have no shoes and am out the money. At this point it is just theft. I just want my money back for the shoes I don't have. Tracking shows they received the shoes over a month ago.

title: Wide width not actually wide
body: I have a pair of spacecloud and they fit good but the new orbit ones are not a true wide width. They seem the same as the regular. They hurt my feet after only a couple hours. The spacecloud I can wear all day. I'm disappointed since I like the look of them better but won't be able to wear them. Guess I should have tried them in the house longer before wearing to work.

title: Uncomfortable hard as rocks for 13-hour nursing shifts
body: Uncomfortable, hard as rocks. I'm a nurse, I'm on my feet for 13 hours a day, and I am in SO much pain every time I wear these. My feet, my ankles, my legs, my back. They're awful. I've had them for about 2 months and have given them more than a fair chance to 'break in'. Nothing helps. The ONLY pro is that they wipe clean easily. A waste of $150.
personas: The Plantar Fasciitis & Heel Pain Sufferer

title: Sole came off after a year of daily use
body: Worst shoes for the price. The bottom non slip part of the shoe came off after about a year of M-F use in a brewery. I've had $30 shoes from Walmart last longer. I wanted to love them, they are comfortable but the quality is terrible. Save your money.

title: No arch support, feet killing me halfway through the day
body: Not comfortable at all. I am a mail carrier and my feet are killing me half way through the day. There is no arch support. I have had them for 2 months hoping I just needed to break them in, but if anything they are getting more uncomfortable. I wish I would have returned them after the first week.
personas: The Plantar Fasciitis & Heel Pain Sufferer

title: Sizing wrong, customer service unresponsive
body: I ordered a size 9 which I have worn for 30 years and my toes were at the very end. The website says they are true to size but they are not. I have emailed them 3 times about returning them and have not heard a word back from them. Terrible customer service.

title: Shoe falling apart, no help from customer service
body: I bought a pair of shoes from Snibbs and in less then a year the shoe is falling apart on the inside causing discomfort and pain to my foot. I reached out to customer service for a refund or replacement and they told me there is nothing they can do. For being a company that prides itself on making a quality work shoe this one is not.
